entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: The crop being evaluated for kernel and oil quality traits

entities.name: KERNEL QUALITY
entities.description: Quality characteristics of the peanut kernel

entities.name: OIL QUALITY
entities.description: Quality characteristics of the peanut oil

entities.name: QUALITY TRAITS
entities.description: A set of 21 phenotypic characteristics used to evaluate peanut varieties

entities.name: CRUDE FAT
entities.description: A quality trait measuring the fat content of peanut kernels

entities.name: PROTEIN
entities.description: A quality trait measuring the protein content of peanut kernels

entities.name: FATTY ACIDS
entities.description: A quality trait measuring the fatty acid composition of peanut oil

entities.name: AMINO ACIDS
entities.description: A quality trait measuring the amino acid composition of peanut kernels

entities.name: OLEIC ACID
entities.description: A specific unsaturated fatty acid measured in peanut varieties

entities.name: LINOLEIC ACID
entities.description: A specific unsaturated fatty acid measured in peanut varieties

entities.name: NEAR INFRA-RED SPECTROSCOPY
entities.description: Technology used for phenotyping quality traits like fat, protein, and acids

entities.name: NATIONAL OFFICIAL FIELD TESTS
entities.description: The standardized field testing process used to phenotype peanut varieties

entities.name: PRINCIPAL COMPONENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to reduce dimensionality and identify key factors of quality traits

entities.name: CLUSTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to group peanut varieties based on quality trait similarities

entities.name: SOUTH CHINA
entities.description: The geographical region where the field tests were conducted

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAM
entities.description: The systematic process of improving crop varieties for specific traits

entities.name: QUALITY BREEDING
entities.description: The specific application of breeding to improve the quality traits of a crop

entities.name: SINGLE FACTOR ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method of analysis that focuses on one trait at a time, noted for potential bias
